name: idris-pushes-back
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man at table, speaking with careful precision. Cool blue light now mixing with amber. Behind him: room in transition, screens glowing. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: I think you're angry. I think the Ascendancy failed you in ways I can't fix.

name: his-assessment
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired man, dark eyes steady. Delivering assessment without flinching. Split lighting — warm left, cool right. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: The Sovereignty isn't salvation. It's just newer rot that hasn't had time to show.

name: sera-steps-toward-him
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman stepping away from window toward room center. Forward motion, closing distance. Cool window light behind her, warmer room ahead. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: two-shot-closer
prompt: Two-shot from side. Dark-haired man LEFT, brunette woman CENTER-RIGHT. Closer now — the distance between them halved. Cool blue-white room around them. Tension in the reduced space. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: Staying inside a collapsing structure isn't loyalty, Idris. It's denial.
